features: Add a touch of fragrance to any room with this set of 3 Floral Fragranced Room Spray bottles. Choose from 3 scents to suit your preferences and enjoy a refreshing, odour-eliminating aroma in your car, toilet, or wardrobe.

Each bottle contains 250ml of aerosol power source, making it easy to instal and suitable for indoor use. The modern style and colourful floral theme of these room sprays make them a perfect addition to any home decor.
The scent is assorted and mixed, giving you a pleasant and unique fragrance experience. Made by the trusted brand Floral, these room sprays are unisex and suitable for all rooms.
description: Product description 3x Floral Fragranced Room Spray - 3 Scents to Choose From - 250ml Add a touch of fragrance to any room with this set of 3 Floral Fragranced Room Spray bottles. Choose from 3 scents to suit your preferences and enjoy a refreshing, odour-eliminating aroma in your car, toilet, or wardrobe. Each bottle contains 250ml of aerosol power source, making it easy to instal and suitable for indoor use. The modern style and colourful floral theme of these room sprays make them a perfect addition to any home decor. The scent is assorted and mixed, giving you a pleasant and unique fragrance experience. Made by the trusted brand Floral, these room sprays are unisex and suitable for all rooms. Ingredients Octahydro
